case_title: CITIBANK, N.A. VS. JOE D TAM

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, JOE D SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-29-2012
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, JOE D
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JOE TAM'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION FAILS TO ESTABLISH THAT HE DID NOT RECEIVE ACTUAL NOTICE. HOWEVER, THE COURT GRANTS DISCRETIONARY RELIEF PURSUANT TO CCP 473(B) ON THE GROUND OF SURPRISE OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. PURSUANT TO CCP 473(C)(1)(C), DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF'S COSTS OF SEEKING ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND POSTJUDGMENT COSTS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $508.50. DEFENDANT MUST FILE THE ANSWER SUBMITTED WITH HIS REPLY PAPERS WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2014 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-25-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Set For Trial On Nov-12-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar May-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: A R G U E D. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT JOE TAM'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is granted. Defendant's declaration fails to establish that he did not receive actual notice. However, the Court grants discretionary relief pursuant to CCP 473(b) on the ground of surprise or excusable neglect. Pursuant to CCP 473(c)(1)(C), defendant shall pay plaintiff's costs of seeking entry of default and default judgment and postjudgment costs, in the amount of $508.50. Defendant must file the answer submitted with his reply papers within 10 days of entry of order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
